name: Joruri-P.U.N.K. Nashiwari Surprise
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｊｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジョウルリ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ．Ｕ．Ｎ．Ｋ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パンク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ナシワリ・サプライズ
desc: Target 1 Set card your opponent controls, or, if you control a "P.U.N.K." monster, you can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls instead; destroy it. You can only activate 1 "Joruri-P.U.N.K. Nashiwari Surprise" per turn.
eff: Target 1 Set card your opponent controls, or, if you control a "P.U.N.K." monster, you can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls instead; destroy it. You can only activate 1 "Joruri-P.U.N.K. Nashiwari Surprise" per turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
